The '''Calamari Council''',<ref name="The Rebel Alliance" /> also known as the '''Mon Calamari government council''',<ref name="The Separatists">{{EncyclopediaCite|The Separatists}}</ref> was a representative council on the [[planet]] [[Mon Cala]]. Prior to serving as a [[captain]] in the [[Mon Calamari Guard]], [[Gial Ackbar]] was the representative of [[Coral City]] in the Calamari Council.<ref name="The Rebel Alliance" /> During the [[Republic Era]], the council approved the election of [[Tikkes]] as [[Senator]] of Mon Cala in the [[Galactic Republic]]'s [[Galactic Senate|senate]].<ref name="The Separatists" />
{{Stub}}
